item.title: 粤语歌｜下一站天后 注音版
item.description:
站dzaam6在 dzoi6大 daai6丸 jyn2前 tsin4

细sai3心 sam1看 hon3看 hon3我 ngo5的 dik7路 lou6

再dzoi3下 haa6个 go3车 tse1站 dzaam6

到dou3天 tin1后 hau6当 dong1然 jin4最 dzoey3好 hou2

但daan6华 waa4丽 lai6的 dik7星 sing1途 tou4

途tou4中 dzung1一 jat7旦 daan3畏 wai3高 gou1

背bui3后 hau6会 wui5否 fau2还 waan4有 jau5他 taa1拥 jung2抱 pou5

在dzoi6百 baak8德 dak7新 san1街 gaai1的 dik7爱 oi3侣 loey5

面min6上 soeng6有 jau5种 dzung2顾 gu3盼 paan3自 dzi6豪 hou4

在dzoi6台 toi4上 soeng5任 jam6我 ngo5唱 tsoeng3

未mei6必 bit7风 fung1光 gwong1更 gang3好 hou2

人jan4气 hei3不 bat7过 gwo3肥 fei4皂 dzou6泡 pou5

即dzik7使 si2有 jau5天 tin1开 hoi1个 go3唱 tsoeng3

谁soey4又 jau6要 jiu3唱 tsoeng3他 taa1不 bat7可 ho2到 dou3现 jin6场 tsoeng4

仍jing4然 jin4仿 fong2似 tsi5白 baak9活 wut9一 jat7场 tsoeng4

不bat7恋 lyn2爱 oi3教 gaau3我 ngo5怎 dzam2样 joeng6唱 tsoeng3

几gei2多 do1爱 oi3歌 go1给 kap7我 ngo5唱 tsoeng3

还waan4是 si6勉 min5强 koeng5台 toi4前 tsin4如 jy4何 ho4发 faat8亮 loeng6

难naan4及 kap9给 kap7最 dzoey3爱 oi3在 dzoi6耳 ji5边 bin1

低dai1声 seng1温 wan1柔 jau4地 dei6唱 tsoeng3

白baak9日 jat9梦 mung6飞 fei1翔 tsoeng4

永wing5不 bat7太 taai3远 jyn5太 taai3抽 tsau1象 dzoeng6

最dzoey3后 hau6变 bin3天 tin1后 hau6

变bin3新 san1娘 noeng4都 dou1是 si6理 lei5想 soeng2

在dzoi6时 si4代 doi6的 dik7广 gwong2场 tsoeng4

谁soey4都 dou1总 dzung2会 wui5有 jau5奖 dzoeng2

我ngo5没 mut9有 jau5歌 go1迷 mai4有 jau5他 taa1景 ging2仰 joeng5

在dzoi6百 baak8德 dak7新 san1街 gaai1的 dik7爱 oi3侣 loey5

面min6上 soeng6有 jau5种 dzung2顾 gu3盼 paan3自 dzi6豪 hou4

在dzoi6台 toi4上 soeng5任 jam6我 ngo5唱 tsoeng3

未mei6必 bit7风 fung1光 gwong1更 gang3好 hou2

人jan4气 hei3不 bat7过 gwo3肥 fei4皂 dzou6泡 pou5

即dzik7使 si2有 jau5天 tin1开 hoi1个 go3唱 tsoeng3

谁soey4又 jau6要 jiu3唱 tsoeng3他 taa1不 bat7可 ho2到 dou3现 jin6场 tsoeng4

仍jing4然 jin4仿 fong2似 tsi5白 baak9活 wut9一 jat7场 tsoeng4

不bat7恋 lyn2爱 oi3教 gaau3我 ngo5怎 dzam2样 joeng6唱 tsoeng3

几gei2多 do1爱 oi3歌 go1给 kap7我 ngo5唱 tsoeng3

还waan4是 si6勉 min5强 koeng5台 toi4前 tsin4如 jy4何 ho4发 faat8亮 loeng6

难naan4及 kap9给 kap7最 dzoey3爱 oi3在 dzoi6耳 ji5边 bin1

低dai1声 seng1温 wan1柔 jau4地 dei6唱 tsoeng3

几gei2多 do1爱 oi3歌 go1给 kap7我 ngo5唱 tsoeng3

还waan4是 si6勉 min5强 koeng5台 toi4前 tsin4如 jy4何 ho4发 faat8亮 loeng6

难naan4及 kap9给 kap7最 dzoey3爱 oi3在 dzoi6耳 ji5边 bin1

低dai1声 seng1温 wan1柔 jau4地 dei6唱 tsoeng3

其kei4实 sat9心 sam1里 loey5最 dzoey3大 daai6理 lei5想 soeng2

跟gan1他 taa1归 gwai1家 gaa1为 wai6他 taa1唱 tsoeng3

item.title: 粤语歌｜骊歌 注音版
粤语歌｜狮子山下 注音版
item.description:
人 jan4生 sang1中 dzung1有 jau5欢 fun1喜 hei2

难 naan4免 min5亦 jik9常 soeng4有 jau5泪 loey6

我 ngo5哋 dei6大 daai6家 gaa1 在 dzoi6狮 si1子 dzi2山 saan1下 haa6相 soeng2遇 jy6上 soeng5

总 dzung2算 syn3是 si6欢 fun1笑 siu3多 do1于 jy1唏 hei1嘘 hoey7

人 jan4生 sang1不 bat7免 min5崎 kei1岖 koey7

难 naan4以 ji5绝 dzyt9无 mou4挂 gwaa3虑 loey6

既 gei3是 si6同 tung4舟 dzau1 在 dzoi6狮 si1子 dzi2山 saan1下 haa6且 tse2共 gung6济 dzai3

抛 paau1弃 hei3区 koey7分 fan1求 kau4共 gung6对 doey3

放 fong3开 hoi1彼 bei2此 tsi2心 sam1中 dzung1矛 maau4盾 toen5

理 lei5想 soeng2一 jat7起 hei2去 hoey3追 dzoey7

同 tung4舟 dzau1人 jan4 誓 sai6相 soeng2随 tsoey4

无 mou4畏 wai3更 gang3无 mou4惧 goey6

同 tung4处 tsy5海 hoi2角 gok8天 tin1边 bin1

携 kwai4手 sau2踏 daap9平 ping4崎 kei1岖 koey7

我 ngo5哋 dei6大 daai6家 gaa1

用 jung6艰 gaan1辛 san1努 nou5力 lik9写 se2下 haa6那 naa5 不 bat7朽 nau2香 hoeng1江 gong1名 ming4句 goey3

放 fong3开 hoi1彼 bei2此 tsi2心 sam1中 dzung1矛 maau4盾 toen5

理 lei5想 soeng2一 jat7起 hei2去 hoey3追 dzoey7

同 tung4舟 dzau1人 jan4 誓 sai6相 soeng2随 tsoey4

无 mou4畏 wai3更 gang3无 mou4惧 goey6

同 tung4处 tsy5海 hoi2角 gok3天 tin1边 bin1

携 kwai4手 sau2踏 daap9平 ping4崎 kei1岖 koey7

我 ngo5哋 dei6大 daai6家 gaa1

用 jung6艰 gaan1辛 san1努 nou5力 lik9写 se2下 haa6那 naa5 不 bat7朽 nau2香 hoeng1江 gong1名 ming4句 goey3

item.title: 粤语歌｜相思风雨中 注音版
item.description:
难 naan4解 gaai2百 baak8般 bun1愁 sau4相 soeng2知 dzi1爱 oi3意 ji3浓 nung4

情 tsing4海 hoi2变 bin3苍 tsong1茫 mong4痴 tsi1心 sam1遇 jy6冷 laang5风 fung1

分 fan1飞 fei1各 gok8天 tin1涯 ngaai4他 taa1朝 dziu1可 ho2会 wui3相 soeng2逢 fung4

萧 siu1萧 siu1风 fung1声 seng1凄 tsai1泣 jap7暴 bou6雨 jy5中 dzung1

人 jan4海 hoi2里 lei5漂 piu1浮 fau4辗 dzin2转 dzyn2却 koek8是 si6梦 mung6

情 tsing4深 sam1永 wing5相 soeng1传 tsyn4飘 piu1于 jy1万 maan6世 sai3空 hung1

当 dong1霜 soeng1雪 syt8飘 piu1时 si4

但 daan6愿 jyn6花 faa1亦 jik9艳 jim6红 hung4

未 mei6惧 goey6路 lou6上 soeng6烟 jin1雨 jy5蒙 mung4

啊 aa1寄 gei3相 soeng1思 si1风 fung1雨 jy5中 dzung1

啊 aa1寄 gei3痴 tsi1心 sam1风 fung1雨 jy5中 dzung1

抱 pou5月 jyt9去 hoey3化 faa3春 tsoen1风 fung1云 wan4外 ngoi6追 dzoey7踪 dzung1鸳 jin1侣 loey5梦 mung6

恨 han6满 mun5胸 hung1愁 sau4红 hung4尘 tsan4多 do1作 dzok8弄 lung6

难 naan4解 gaai2百 baak8般 bun1愁 sau4相 soeng2知 dzi1爱 oi3意 ji3浓 nung4

情 tsing4海 hoi2变 bin3苍 tsong1茫 mong4痴 tsi1心 sam1遇 jy6冷 laang5风 fung1

分 fan1飞 fei1各 gok8天 tin1涯 ngaai4

但 daan6愿 jyn6他 taa1日 jat9重 tsung4逢 fung4

夜 je6漫 maan6漫 maan6路 lou6上 soeng6珍 dzan1重 dzung6

人 jan4海 hoi2里 lei5漂 piu1浮 fau4辗 dzin2转 dzyn2却 koek8是 si6梦 mung6

情 tsing4深 sam1永 wing5相 soeng1传 tsyn4飘 piu1于 jy1万 maan6世 sai3空 hung1

当 dong1霜 soeng1雪 syt8飘 piu1时 si4

但 daan6愿 jyn6花 faa1亦 jik9艳 jim6红 hung4

未 mei6惧 goey6路 lou6上 soeng6烟 jin1雨 jy5蒙 mung4

啊 aa1寄 gei3相 soeng1思 si1风 fung1雨 jy5中 dzung1

啊 aa1寄 gei3痴 tsi1心 sam1风 fung1雨 jy5中 dzung1

抱 pou5月 jyt9去 hoey3化 faa3春 tsoen1风 fung1云 wan4外 ngoi6追 dzoey7踪 dzung1鸳 jin1侣 loey5梦 mung6

恨 han6满 mun5胸 hung1愁 sau4红 hung4尘 tsan4多 do1作 dzok8弄 lung6

难 naan4解 gaai2百 baak8般 bun1愁 sau4相 soeng2知 dzi1爱 oi3意 ji3浓 nung4

情 tsing4海 hoi2变 bin3苍 tsong1茫 mong4痴 tsi1心 sam1遇 jy6冷 laang5风 fung1

分 fan1飞 fei1各 gok8天 tin1涯 ngaai4

但 daan6愿 jyn6他 taa1日 jat9重 tsung4逢 fung4

夜 je6漫 maan6漫 maan6路 lou6上 soeng6珍 dzan1重 dzung6

寒 hon4夜 je6里 loey5霜 soeng1雪 syt8飘 piu1时 si4

但 daan6愿 jyn6花 faa1亦 jik9艳 jim6红 hung4

别 bit9后 hau6路 lou6上 soeng6珍 dzan1重 dzung6

item.title: 粤语歌｜几许风雨注音版
item.description:
无mou4言 jin4轻 hing倚 ji2窗 tsoeng1边 bin1凝 jing4望 mong6雨 jy5势 sai3急 gap7也 jaa5乱 lyn6

似tsi5个 go3疯 fung1汉 hon3满 mun5肚 tou5郁 wat7结 git8怒 nou6骂 maa6着 dzoek8厌 jim3倦 gyn6

徐tsoey4徐 tsoey4呼 fu1出 tsoet7烟 jin1圈 hyn1回 wui4望 mong6以 ji5往 wong5的 dik7片 pin3段 dyn6

几gei2许 hoey2风 fung1雨 jy5我 ngo5也 jaa5经 ging1过 gwo3屹 ngat9立 laap9到 dou3目 muk9前 tsin4

一jat7生 sang1之 dzi1中 dzung1谁 soey4没 mut9痛 tung3苦 fu2得 dak7失 sat7少 siu2不 bat7免 min5

看hon3透 tau3世 sai3态 taai3每 mui5种 dzung2风 fung1雨 jy5披 pei1身 san1打 daa2我 ngo5面 min6

身san1处 tsy3高 gou1峰 fung1尝 soeng4尽 dzoen6雨 jy5丝 si1轻 hing1风 fung1的 dik7加 gaa1冕 min5

偶ngau5尔 ji5碰 pung3上 soeng5了 liu5急 gap7风 fung1步 bou6伐 fat9未 mei6凌 ling4乱 lyn6

心sam1底 dai2之 dzi1中 dzung1知 dzi1分 fan1寸 tsyn3得 dak7失 sat7差 tsaa1一 jat7线 sin3

披pei1荆 ging1斩 dzaam2棘 kik7/gik7的 dik7挑 tiu1战 dzin3光 gwong1辉 fai1不 bat7眷 gyn3恋 lyn2

悠jau4然 jin4想 soeng2起 hei2当 dong1天 tin1无 mou4尽 dzoen6冷 laang5眼 ngaan5加 gaa1嘴 dzoey2脸 lim5

正dzing3似 tsi5风 fung1雨 jy5每 mui5每 mui5改 goi2变 bin3现 jin6实 sat9尽 dzoen6体 tai2验 jim6

无mou4求 kau4一 jat7生 sang1光 gwong1辉 fai1唯 wai4望 mong6斗 dau3志 dzi3不 bat7会 wui5断 tyn5

见gin3惯 gwaan3风 fung1雨 jy5见 gin3惯 gwaan3改 goi2变 bin3尽 dzoen6视 si6作 dzok8自 dzi6然 jin4

一jat7生 sang1之 dzi1中 dzung1谁 soey4没 mut9痛 tung3苦 fu2得 dak7失 sat7少 siu2不 bat7免 min5

看hon3透 tau3世 sai3态 taai3每 mui5种 dzung2风 fung1雨 jy5披 pei1身 san1打 daa2我 ngo5面 min6

身san1处 tsy3高 gou1峰 fung1尝 soeng4尽 dzoen6雨 jy5丝 si1轻 heng1风 fung1的 dik7加 gaa1冕 min5

偶ngau5尔 ji5碰 pung3上 soeng5了 liu5急 gap7风 fung1步 bou6伐 fat9未 mei6凌 ling4乱 lyn6

心sam1底 dai2之 dzi1中 dzung1知 dzi1分 fan1寸 tsyn3得 dak7失 sat7差 tsaa1一 jat7线 sin3

披pei1荆 ging1斩 dzaam2棘 kik7/gik7的 dik7挑 tiu1战 dzin3光 gwong1辉 fai1不 bat7眷 gyn3恋 lyn2

悠jau4然 jin4推 toey7窗 tsoeng1观 gun1天 tin1云 wan4渐 dzim6散 saan3去 hoey3星 sing1再 dzoi3现 jin6

雨jy5线 sin3飘 piu1断 tyn5似 tsi5我 ngo5的 dik7脸 lim5热 jit9泪 loey6聚 dzoey6满 mun5面 min6

然jin4而 ji4不 bat7死 sei2春 tsoen1天 tin1全 tsyn4赖 laai6暖 nyn5意 ji3不 bat7间 gaan1断 tyn5

似tsi5你 nei5的 dik7脸 lim5叫 giu3我 ngo5温 wan1暖 nyn5伴 bun6着 dzoek8我 ngo5步 bou6前 tsin4

似tsi5你 nei5的 dik7脸 lim5叫 giu3我 ngo5温 wan1暖 nyn5伴 bun6着 dzoek8我 ngo5步 bou6前 tsin4

item.title: 粤语歌｜小李飞刀 注音版
item.description:
难 naan4得 dak7一 jat7身 san1好 hou2本 bun2领 ling5

情 tsing4关 gwaan1始 tsi2终 dzung1闯 tsong2不 bat7过 gwo3

闯 tsong2不 bat7过 gwo3柔 jau4情 tsing4蜜 mat9意 ji3

乱 lyn6挥 fai1刀 dou1剑 gim3无 mou4结 git8果 gwo2

流 lau4水 soey2滔 tou1滔 tou1斩 dzaam2不 bat7断 dyn6

情 tsing4丝 si1百 baak8结 git8冲 tsung1不 bat7破 po3

刀 dou1锋 fung1冷 laang5热 jit9情 tsing4未 mei6冷 laang5

心 sam1底 dai2更 gang3是 si6难 naan4过 gwo3

无 mou4情 tsing4刀 dou1永 wing5不 bat7知 dzi1错 tso3

无 mou4缘 jyn4分 fan1只 dzi2叹 taan3奈 noi6何 ho4

面 min6对 doey3死 sei2不 bat7会 wui5惊 geng1怕 paa3

离 lei4别 bit9心 sam1凄 tsai1楚 tso2

人 jan4生 sang1几 gei2许 hoey2失 sat7意 ji3

何 ho4必 bit7偏 pin1偏 pin1选 syn2中 dzung3我 ngo5

挥 fai1刀 dou1剑 gim3断 tyn5盟 mang4约 joek8

相 soeng1识 sik7注 dzy3定 ding6成 sing4大 daai6错 tso3

无 mou4情 tsing4刀 dou1永 wing5不 bat7知 dzi1错 tso3

无 mou4缘 jyn4分 fan1只 dzi2叹 taan3奈 noi6何 ho4

面 min6对 doey3死 sei2不 bat7会 wui5惊 geng1怕 paa3

离 lei4别 bit9心 sam1凄 tsai1楚 tso2

人 jan4生 sang1几 gei2许 hoey2失 sat7意 ji3

何 ho4必 bit7偏 pin1偏 pin1选 syn2中 dzung3我 ngo5

挥 fai1刀 dou1剑 gim3断 tyn5盟 mang4约 joek8

相 soeng1识 sik7注 dzy3定 ding6成 sing4大 daai6错 tso3

挥 fai1刀 dou1剑 gim3断 tyn5盟 mang4约 joek8

相 soeng1识 sik7注 dzy3定 ding6成 sing4大 daai6错 tso3

item.title: 粤语歌｜飘雪 注音版
item.description:
又 jau6 见 gin3 雪 syt8 飘 piu1 过 gwo3

飘 piu1 于 jy1 伤 soeng1 心 sam1 记 gei3 忆 jik7 中 dzung1

让 joeng6 我 ngo5 再 dzoi3 想 soeng2 你 nei5

却 koek8 掀 hin1 起 hei2 我 ngo5 心 sam1 痛 tung3

早 zou2 经 ging1 分 fan1 了 liu5 手 sau2

为 wai6 何 ho4 热 jit9 爱 oi3 尚 soeng6 情 tsing4 重 dzung6

独 duk9 过 gwo3 追 dzeoy1 忆 jik7 岁 seoy3 月 jyt9

或 waak9 许 hoey2 此 tsi2 生 sam1 不 bat7 会 wui6 懂 dung2

又 jau6 再 dzoi3 想 soeng2 起 hei2 你 nei5

抱 pou5 拥 jung2 飘 piu1 飘 piu1 白 baat9 雪 syt8 中 dzung1

让 joeng6 你 nei5 心 sam1 中 dzung1 暖 nyn5

去 hoey3 驱 koey1 走 dzau2 我 ngo5 冰 bing1 冻 dung3

冷 laang5 风 fung1 催 tsoey3 我 ngo5 醒 sing2

原 jyn5 来 loi4 共 gung6 你 nei5 是 si6 场 tsoeng4 梦 mung6

像 zoeng6 那 naa5 飘 piu1 飘 piu1 雪 syt8 泪 loey6 下 haa6

弄 lung6 湿 sap7 冷 laang5 清 tsing1 的 dik7 晚 maan5 空 hung1

原 jyn5 来 loi4 是 si6 那 naa5 么 mo1 深 sam1 爱 oi3 你 nei5

此 tsi2 际 zai3 伴 bun6 着 zoek9 我 ngo5 追 dzoey1 忆 jik7 的 dik7 心 sam1 痛 tung3

item.title: 粤语歌｜万水千山总是情 注音版
粤语歌｜祝福你 注音版
闽南语歌｜世界第一等（注音）
A Language-Based Approach to Security
item.description:
Authors: Fred B. Schneider, Greg Morrisett, Robert Harper

Abstract

Language-based security leverages program analysis and program rewriting to enforce security policies. The approach promises eﬃcient enforcement of ﬁne-grained access control policies and depends on a trusted computing base of only modest size. This paper surveys progress and prospects for the area, giving overviews of in-lined reference monitors, certifying compilers, and advances in type theory.

Notes

1. Why do we need language-based security?

Two classic computer security principles:

item.title: Everything You Want to Know About Pointer Based Checking
item.description:
Authors: Santosh Nagarakatte, Milo M. K. Martin, and Steve Zdancewic

Keywords: Memory safety, Buﬀer overflows, Dangling pointers, Pointer-based check- ing, SoftBoundCETS

[SNAPL'15]

What problem does this paper try to solve?

Provide full memory safety for C.

Why is the problem important?

Refer to Google’s article: Secure by Design: Google’s Perspective on Memory Safety

What is this paper’s solution to the problem?

Employ a pointer-based approach which injecting code to maintain per-pointer metadata and checking the metadata before dereferencing a pointer. The metadata is stored in a disjoint space.

item.title: SoK: Eternal War in Memory
item.description:
Authors: László Szekeres, Mathias Payer, Tao Wei, Dawn Song

Category: SoK

Keywords: security, memory safety

What problem does this paper survey?

Why do exploits still exist?

How they defeat currently deployed protections?

How to defeat them?

Questions asked by this paper

  1. How do exploits work?

Q: Why is reading from a pointer under the attacker’s control vulnerable?

A: Because the attacker can control the value being read, for example, an ROP gadget.
